title: Warm up
content: The slide presents images of drivers in three different cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image depicts unique aspects of the city.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide highlights China's transformation with images of taxis and iconic structures from different cities. It introduces the theme of exploring China's growth through transportation.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide outlines a session focused on investigating local city features, development strategies, and the resultant positive impacts.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide pairs each city with its development strategy: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: Highlights development strategies of three cities through taxi drivers' perspectives. It emphasizes that each city develops strategies based on local features for growth.
